Why Choose Sam Feeds

Performance Benefits

Every bag of Sam Feeds is engineered with precision nutrition to unlock your cattle's full potential.

More Milk / Better Yield
Optimized energy-protein balance drives significantly higher milk production per lactation cycle.
↑ Up to 15% More Yield
Strong Health / Better Immunity
Fortified vitamins, chelated minerals and probiotics build robust immune defense against common diseases.
Fortified Immunity Formula
Better Digestion / Higher Nutrition
High-quality fiber, bypass protein and digestive enzymes promote superior gut function and nutrient uptake.
↑ Higher Nutrient Bioavailability
Steam Treated Technology
High-pressure steam pelleting destroys pathogens, improves starch digestibility and ensures uniform pellet quality.
Advanced Pellet Technology

Our Commitment

Built on Trust & Standards

From the Canadian prairies to the Indian dairy belt — uncompromising quality at every step of production.

Aflatoxin Controlled
Every batch screened below 10 ppb — far stricter than the 20 ppb BIS limit. Mycotoxin safety is non-negotiable.
Canadian Registered
Formulated under Canadian regulatory oversight, precisely adapted for Indian dairy genetics and management systems.
Indian Manufacturing
Produced locally in Uttarakhand with global-grade raw materials — ensuring freshness, cost efficiency, and supply reliability.
Steam Treated
High-pressure steam pelleting destroys pathogens, improves digestibility and ensures uniform nutrient distribution per pellet.
NABL Lab Tested
Third-party testing at NABL-accredited laboratories ensures independent verification of every nutritional claim we make.
Canadian Quality — Global Standards
About Uncle Sam Nutrition

Canadian Quality
Global Standards

Uncle Sam Nutrition is a Canadian-registered animal nutrition brand committed to providing premium livestock feed solutions that promote healthier animals, higher productivity, and sustainable farming practices.

Our scientifically formulated feed products are developed using carefully selected ingredients and advanced nutritional principles to support optimal animal health, improved milk production, and better feed efficiency.

Through our strategic partnership with Sam Feeds and manufacturing collaboration with Pashupati Industries in India, we ensure consistent quality, reliable production, and efficient distribution to serve modern dairy and livestock farmers across the country.

  • Canadian-registered brand with global quality standards
  • Manufactured in India by Pashupati Industries
  • Scientifically formulated for optimal animal health
  • Supports higher milk production & feed efficiency
  • Empowering farmers with high-performance nutrition

Canadian Quality • Global Standards • Trusted Performance

Business Opportunity

Become a Sam Feeds Business Partner

Join our growing network of business partners across North India. High margins, strong demand, and full brand support.

Partner with a
Premium Brand

Sam Feeds is experiencing strong demand in the Indian dairy belt. We are actively looking for motivated business partners in Uttarakhand, Uttar Pradesh, Punjab, Haryana, and Rajasthan.

  • High profit margins with exclusive territory rights
  • Reliable supply chain from Uttarakhand plant
  • Full brand and marketing material support
  • Dedicated sales & technical support team
  • Official business partner certification provided
